productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Big Cat Large Black Backpacks
description: Whether for Sports or your next shopping spree, the puma Big cat Large backpack is your ideal companion! Length: 32 cm Large main compartment with two-way zipper Stitched-on zippered pocket with four slip-in compartments Two side pockets for keeping water bottles Secure and comfortable with adjustable, padded shoulder straps and reflective puma logo Padded back section for comfort Puma Cat logo embroidered on the front pocket Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
